pokemon:cinccino.name: Cinccino
pokemon:cinccino.summary: Cinccino’s body is coated in a special oil that helps it deflect attacks, such as punches.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Cinccino’s body is coated in a special oil that helps it deflect attacks, such as punches.
Their white fur is coated in a special oil that makes it easy for them to deflect attacks.
Cinccino’s body is coated in a special oil that helps it deflect attacks, such as punches.
Their white fur feels amazing to touch. Their fur repels dust and prevents static electricity from building up.
A special oil that seeps through their fur helps them avoid attacks. The oil fetches a high price at market.
Its body secretes oil that this Pokémon spreads over its nest as a coating to protect it from dust. Cinccino won’t tolerate even a speck of the stuff.
The oil that seeps from its body is really smooth. For people troubled by bad skin, this oil is an effective treatment.
The white parts of its coat are covered in an oil secreted from its body, so this Pokémon can slide right away from its enemies’ attacks.
Their white fur feels amazing to touch. Their fur repels dust and prevents static electricity from building up.
Cinccino’s body is coated in a special oil that helps it deflect attacks, such as punches.
Their white fur feels amazing to touch. Their fur repels dust and prevents static electricity from building up.
Cinccino’s body is coated in a special oil that helps it deflect attacks, such as punches.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Cinccino’s body is coated in a special oil that helps it deflect attacks, such as punches.

pokemon:minccino.name: Minccino
pokemon:minccino.summary: These Pokémon prefer a tidy habitat. They are always sweeping and dusting, using their tails as brooms.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: These Pokémon prefer a tidy habitat. They are always sweeping and dusting, using their tails as brooms.
They greet one another by rubbing each other with their tails, which are always kept well groomed and clean.
Minccino greet each other by grooming one another thoroughly with their tails.
Minccino greet each other by grooming one another thoroughly with their tails.
They pet each other with their tails as a form of greeting. Of the two, the one whose tail is fluffier is a bit more boastful.
The way it brushes away grime with its tail can be helpful when cleaning. But its focus on spotlessness can make cleaning more of a hassle.
When its tail has gotten dirty from self-cleaning or from cleaning its nest, Minccino spends a whole day washing its tail in clean spring water.
A clean freak that will not allow even the slightest mess, it uses its tail like a mop to thoroughly clean any and all filth.
These Pokémon prefer a tidy habitat. They are always sweeping and dusting, using their tails as brooms.
Minccino greet each other by grooming one another thoroughly with their tails.
Minccino greet each other by grooming one another thoroughly with their tails.
These Pokémon prefer a tidy habitat. They are always sweeping and dusting, using their tails as brooms.
